subcodes.first_line: O thou who hast turned toward the Countenance that hath shone forth, gleamed and illumined the horizons! Say: Praise be unto Thee, O my God, for having guided me [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: یا من توجه الی وجه اضاء و لاح و اشرق به الافاق قل لک الحمد یا الهی بما هدیتنی
subcodes.subjects: @praise and encouragement, @predictions and prophecies, @power; greatness; centrality of the Covenant, @East and West; communication between East and West
